provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: CSP restricts default-src to self with explicit ipc:/http://ipc.localhost connect-src so Tauri IPC keeps working; img-src allows the asset protocol; style-src keeps 'unsafe-inline' for Svelte-injected styles.

findings.evidence: style-src keeps 'unsafe-inline' because Svelte/Tailwind inject inline <style> at runtime; script-src is 'self' only (no unsafe-inline/eval), so the main XSS-execution vector is closed before any credential handling.
findings.fix: Revisit removing style 'unsafe-inline' via nonce/hash if a stricter policy is needed once the UI stabilizes; not blocking for pre-credential hardening.

findings.evidence: Runtime CSP enforcement in the packaged webview is not GUI-verified here; only config parse + build are proven.
findings.fix: Verify the live header via the inspect-app skill (Playwright) when the dev server work resumes; tracked as a non-goal of this task.

summary: Pre-credential hardening only: replaced csp:null with a restrictive baseline CSP (script-src 'self', explicit IPC connect-src), fixed the placeholder window title, and closed the @types/node type-check gap (removing a now-stale ts-expect-error). No credential, login, or storage code introduced. cargo build validates the config, svelte-check is clean (0/0), structural no-op passes. Safe to mark done; runtime CSP header verification deferred to inspect-app as a documented non-goal.
